title: 3D Spears Reimagined
description: Replaces the boring vanilla spears with cool 3D Models
body:
![spears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a71fda14a579c1158a689213c6424ccd8dd1f806.png)

## **3D Spears Reimagined**
Already bored of the simple spear textures in Vanilla? This pack replaces all 7 with custom 3D Models!

Does NOT need Optifine, all features in this pack are completely vanilla.

![in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f3c25deeff0968c84f5dfe9d0e45b9188c27323.png)

## **Terms of Use**

Personal use is allowed. 

Using this pack for the purpose of selling as a cosmetic incentive on the platform you operate. This could include, but is not limited to in-game cosmetics, forum badges, Discord emotes etc. is **prohibited**.

Use (even if modified) for monetized videos must include a link to this page. Please ask before using the pack in any videos/content.

Do not redistribute or resell.

Using this pack as a template to make your own textures that work the same way in game as mine is allowed and encouraged, this is a very bare-bones and simple pack to use as a guide.
